questionHtml:
How should a measurement of 5.00 g from a balance be recorded?

A. 5.00 ± 0.1 g

B. 5.00 ± 0.01 g

C. 5.00 ± 1 g

D. 5.00 ± 0.001 g

meta.title: How should a measurement of 5.00 g from a balance be recorded? A. 5.00 ± 0.1 g B. 5.00 ± 0.01 g C. 5.00 ± 1 g D. 5.00 ± 0.001 g
breadcrumbLabels: 11.1 Uncertainties and errors in measurement and results
